---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

::: {.column-screen .gradient-banner}
::: {.container .header-container}

# Blog
### Notes on data science, AI assurance, quantitative modeling, and the craft of building reliable systems.

:::
:::

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Quarto listing card overrides ─── */
.quarto-grid-item {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0 !important;
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease !important;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.quarto-grid-item:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(26,54,93,0.12) !important;
  border-color: #bee3f8 !important;
}

.quarto-grid-item .card-title a {
  color: #1a365d !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.quarto-grid-item .card-title a:hover {
  color: #f6ad55 !important;
}

.listing-category {
  background: #ebf8ff !important;
  color: #2b6cb0 !important;
  border: none !important;
  font-size: 0.72rem !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
}

.quarto-listing-filter input {
  border: 1.5px solid #1a365d !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
}
</style>
```
